briefdescription.para: Integer to octet stream primitive limit.

memberdef.name: XSecure_MgfHashList

briefdescription.para: This function starts the sha engine.

parameterdescription.para: holds the XSecure_ShaMode value of chosen sha algo.
is the pointer to SHA algorithm used.

memberdef.argsstring: (XSecure_ShaMode Shatype, void *InstancePtr, u64 InDataAddr, u32 Size)
memberdef.name: XSecure_ShaMgfUpdate

briefdescription.para: This function updates the data to SHA algorithm.

parameterdescription.para: holds the XSecure_ShaMode value of chosen sha algo.
is the pointer to SHA algorithm used.
is the input data address.
is the size of the input data.

briefdescription.para: This function updates SHA engine with final data which includes SHA padding and reads final hash on complete data.

parameterdescription.para: holds the XSecure_ShaMode value of chosen sha algo.
is the pointer to SHA algorithm used.
is the address where the hash is stored.

memberdef.argsstring: (XSecure_ShaMode Shatype, void *InstancePtr, u64 InputDataAddr, u32 Size, u64 HashAddr)
memberdef.name: XSecure_ShaMgfDigest

briefdescription.para: This function updates and calculates sha digest on data.

parameterdescription.para: holds the XSecure_ShaMode value of chosen sha algo.
is the pointer to SHA algorithm used.
is the input data address.
is the size of the input data.
is the address where the hash is stored.

briefdescription.para: This function converts a non-negative integer to an octet string of a specified length.

parameterdescription.para: is the variable in which input should be provided.
holds the required size.
is a pointer in which output will be updated.

briefdescription.para: This function returns hash function list of user specified hash algorithm.

parameterdescription.para: holds the XSecure_ShaMode value of chosen sha algo.

briefdescription.para: This function takes an input of variable length and a desired output length as input, and provides fixed output mask using cryptographic hash function.

parameterdescription.para: is of type XSecure_ShaMode.
is a pointer to the sha instance.
is a pointer to XSecure_MgfInput instance.

listitem.para: XST_INVALID_PARAM If any input parameter is invalid

briefdescription.para: This file contains code related to mask generate function.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
5.2 kpt 06/23/23 Initial release dd 10/11/23 MISRA-C violation Rule 12.1 fixed dd 10/11/23 MISRA-C violation Rule 8.13 fixed 5.3 kpt 12/13/23 Added SHA384 MGF support kpt 03/22/24 Fixed MISRA-C violation Rule 17.7 kal 07/24/24 Code refactoring for versal_2ve_2vm
